channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Several serum proteins may provide prognostic value in metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease
item.description: 1. Distinct circulating and hepatic molecular signatures appear to track metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease progression. 2. Seru...

item.title: Meghan Trainor on Building Confidence and Healthy Habits
item.description: Meghan shares how she’s tuning out criticism, prioritizing her health, and building habits that help her feel stronger than ever.

item.title: What Happens to Your Body When You Drink Enough Water
8 Ways to Get the Protein You Need
Study finds children in the US die at higher rates than peers in other high-income nations
item.description: At every age, children in the United States die at higher rates than peers in other high-income nations, according to a new study from Children's Hosp...
